form.formComment: Won two starts back over 520m at this track. Last start he finished 3rd on April 4 over 520m at this track behind Taw Galaxy beaten one length (29.56) in a NG. Draw likely to suit. Has run hot time here with a 29.31 PB at the distance. Key chance.
